/.src/globalRandomInEffect_preview.ts(6,13): warning TS377071: This Effect code uses `Math.random()`, randomness is represented through the Effect `Random` service. effect(globalRandomInEffect)

    // @effect-diagnostics globalRandomInEffect:warning
    import { Effect } from "effect"

      const r = Math.random()

    })
